feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,122Chapters: 6/11Kudos: 160

Summary: Merlin saunters across the room to the table, long legs gracefully striding. As he passes by Arthur, their arms brush against one another. They both gasp at the brief shock of electricity as skin touches skin. Forgetting himself, Arthur reaches out and lightly traces Merlin’s forearm with his index and middle fingers. Merlin stops in wonderment, his gasp coming out as a whisper, as he watches Arthur’s fingers dancing up his arm. He looks up, and Arthur is staring at him intently. “Hi,” says Merlin. “Hi,” Arthur replies. Or It started the night before Arthur faces the wraith of his uncle Tristan de Bois.Merlin decides to give Arthur several gifts.Neither expects those acts to spark an all-consuming relationship that redefines them both — and quietly begins to rewrite their pre-ordained destiny.No longer two sides of the same coin, they become one joined at the heart.This is their story.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Magical Experiment
entry.summary:
Author: twobraincellscombined

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,346Chapters: 12/14Kudos: 202

Summary: Arthur asks Merlin to learn magic to see if it can be trusted in defeating Morgana.   "We want to ask someone to learn magic to see if it can be used without corrupting the soul of the person who uses it. Lancelot suggested you be the person we ask."Merlin's lips parted a fraction, "He did?""Indeed. Something about your heart being pure." Arthur brushed the compliment off with a wave of his hand and straightened in his seat, "I know you're scared of magic so you don’t have to do this if you don’t want to but-""I'll do it."

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,626Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 304

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.title: An Insufferable Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Araemrys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,125Chapters: 6/12Kudos: 21

Summary: Merlin, the son of the famous bakers in Camelot, had been assigned by his parents to deliver bread for tonight's feast in the castle. That was the first time he met the prince of Camelot, who wasn't like his expectations at all. Arthur Pendragon, the prince of Camelot, returned to the castle after his mission to secure a village from bandits, only to find a boy standing in a room admiring his mother's painting-a boy he found to be insufferable later. From the day they met, they decided that they wouldn't get along well, only to find a shockingly different path in life that they never expected. or Arthur and Merlin didn't like each other. They remained somehow in a complicated state between enemies and a feeling of interest in each other. That was, until one day a sorceress playfully transported them to the future, only to find they were a happy family with a son.

entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 677Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,369Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 67

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: how my heart yearns for him
entry.summary:
Author: ariadne_odair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,683Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: “So,” Arthur begins in a teasing voice. “Did you miss me?”  “No,” Merlin lies. “I have no idea what would give you that impression.”  Arthur arches an eyebrow. “Three days of rain, Merlin?”  Merlin shrugs. “Nature truly is a mystery.”   - Or - Arthur and Merlin reunite after a few day's apart. It is possible Merlin was a (little) dramatic whilst Arthur was away.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Established Relationship

entry.title: wandering stranger
entry.summary:
Author: hansuckss

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,948Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 11

Summary: “Maybe we can make our own, write our own story.” “Maybe. Preferably one where we get a happy ending.” “I’d like that.”As the undead’s screams grow louder and their hands clutch at the edges of his clothes, threatening to drag him back into the darkness, a hand grabs his and pulls him farther into the light.   Or; Two boys find themselves in the apocalypse, with nothing but a desire for a safe haven and the ability to discover some type of light amid the never-ending darkness.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,547Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 762Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Merlin returned on a grey morning, travel-worn and bright-eyed. Arthur saw him before Merlin saw Arthur. He had been crossing the lower courtyard with Leon at his side when the gates opened and— There. Alive. Whole. Infuriatingly radiant.

entry.title: [ART] On Our Knees (At the Curtains of the Waterfall)
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 166Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 62

Summary: King Arthur Pendragon of Camelot and Druid prince Merlin have absolutely nothing in common -- except that duty to their people always comes first.That's how it begins. It isn't how it ends.Created for BBC Merlin RVBB 2025-2026.

entry.title: Stone and Salt and What We Remember
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,378Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 31

Summary: Modern AU. St Andrews University. Merlin is trying very hard to be normal. Arthur Pendragon is very bad at ignoring destiny. Magic leaks through ancient stone, doors appear where they shouldn’t, a dragon wakes beneath the town, and Freshers’ Week gets significantly more complicated. Friends to lovers, reincarnation, arrogance, responsibility, bad decisions, and true love—preferably after several disasters.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Gwen/Lancelot (Merlin)

entry.title: Scales and Ice
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,717Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 12

Summary: This is the Merlin/Heated Rivalry crossover no one asked for but I decided to write any way. Shane, Ilya, and Svetlana unexpectedly find themselves in Camelot. Will they find their way home? Do they decide to stay? And what does Morgana think about all of this? 4/4/26 UPDATE: Chapters 1 and 2 expanded to include additional scenes and details. Apologies if you have already read but I believe the changes will improve the fic overall.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Shane Hollander/Ilya Rozanov
